name: react-pull-to-refreshify
title: Pull to Refreshify
author: liaoliao666
description: Refreshes caller-owned content through a scroll-boundary-aware pull gesture or an explicit accessible action.

changes: Added the client boundary, a visible native Refresh fallback that uses the same refresh dispatcher, pending and disabled state, aria-busy, and one polite atomic caller-owned status.
Retained the controlled refreshing and completion state machine while adding an immediate dispatch latch, cancellable completion timer, cancel reset, and synchronous callback error recovery.
Ignored horizontal and off-boundary drags, used the current viewport height for bounded resistance, and preserved an immediate threshold when threshold is zero.
Limited transitions to transform, removed them under reduced motion, marked the changing visual status presentation-only, and inherited its text color.
Added optional refreshButtonLabel and renderStatus props without changing the existing required API.
Deferred passive-listener detection until a browser event path calls it and removed the temporary detection listener.
Accepted a not-yet-resolved scroll parent, guarded DOM globals for server evaluation, normalized page roots, and clamped overscroll bounce below zero.
Typed native mouse events and the host ref, ignored secondary mouse and multi-touch starts, and added a distinct cancellation callback.
Captured mouse move and release on window, cancelled on touchcancel, pointercancel, blur, or hidden document state, and removed every global listener on unmount.
Removed server-time window initialization and resolved the nearest actually scrollable ancestor after mount.

Prevented native overscroll only for downward vertical pulls inside the content, skipped interception while disabled, re-resolved on resize or orientation and observed size changes, and cleaned every observer and listener.

license.scope: lib/PullToRefreshify.tsx, lib/types.ts, and the complete lib/utils runtime closure

modifications.change: Added the client boundary, explicit native refresh fallback, busy and live semantics, duplicate-dispatch and completion-timer guards, drag cancellation, scroll-axis gating, viewport-based bounded resistance, and reduced-motion-safe transform transitions while retaining the upstream state machine and renderText options.
modifications.reason: Meet the documented SSR, keyboard, assistive-technology, threshold, controlled-refresh, cancellation, cleanup, and reduced-motion gates without replacing the source interaction engine.

modifications.change: Added optional refreshButtonLabel and renderStatus props.
modifications.reason: Keep the required explicit action label and concise live status caller-owned while preserving every existing prop.

modifications.change: Made passive-event detection lazy and server-safe and removed its temporary listener.
modifications.reason: Allow Next server evaluation and avoid retaining a detection listener.

modifications.change: Guarded DOM access, accepted an unresolved parent, normalized page roots, and clamped negative overscroll.
modifications.reason: Keep server evaluation safe and make the top-boundary check reliable for page and nested scrolling.

modifications.change: Added primary-input checks, a distinct cancel path, window mouse capture, pointer/touch/blur/hidden cancellation, and complete listener cleanup.
modifications.reason: Complete drags released outside the element, never refresh after cancellation, and remove global work when hidden or unmounted.

modifications.change: Made scroll-parent discovery client-only and based on actual overflow, limited native-scroll interception to vertical downward pulls, added disabled handling and resize/orientation re-resolution, and cleaned listeners and observation.
modifications.reason: Preserve nested and page scrolling until the real top boundary while remaining correct across mobile viewport changes and unmounts.
